name: sidebar-menu-sub
visual_summary: The Sidebar Menu Sub component is a nested menu element that can be utilized within a sidebar to display a hierarchical list of items. It is often used in conjunction with a sidebar or navigation bar to provide users with a way to explore and access various features of an application. This component is suitable for use cases where a nested menu is necessary for navigation or organizational purposes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready nav component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-menu-sub
Description: The Sidebar Menu Sub component is a nested menu element that can be utilized within a sidebar to display a hierarchical list of items. It is often used in conjunction with a sidebar or navigation bar to provide users with a way to explore and access various features of an application. This component is suitable for use cases where a nested menu is necessary for navigation or organizational purposes.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. clickable, hover
Tags: ui, submenu, nested-menu, sidebar, layout

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
